summary: Complete testing of CarryOn™ beneficiary portal (11 pages), admin dashboard, and two-level section security system. All features tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: Beneficiary login flow: penny@mitchell.com / password123 → redirects to /beneficiary (Estate Hub)
Estate Hub shows estate cards with pre-transition status
Pre-transition page shows emergency docs (Medical Directive, Power of Attorney)
Pre-transition page shows Upload Certificate and Contact Team cards
Beneficiary settings page shows Account section (Email, Name, Role, Primary Benefactor)
Beneficiary settings page shows Security section with 2FA toggle
Beneficiary settings page shows Subscription with 'Premium Beneficiary' tier
Beneficiary settings page shows pricing (Monthly $2.99/mo, Quarterly $8.07/qtr, Annual $28.70/yr)
Beneficiary settings page shows features list (Full vault access, Estate Guardian AI, etc.)
Admin login: admin@carryon.com / admin123 → redirects to /admin
Admin dashboard shows user database with search functionality
Admin dashboard shows role filter (All, Benefactor, Beneficiary, Admin)
Admin dashboard shows platform stats (34 Total Users, 32 Benefactors, 1 Beneficiaries, 2 Estates)
Admin dashboard has 'All Users' and 'Transition Certificates' tabs
GET /api/admin/users returns all users (admin only) - 11 pytest tests passed
GET /api/admin/stats returns platform stats
Section Lock banner visible on Vault page with 'Lock Section' button
Section Lock banner visible on Checklist page
Section Lock banner visible on Messages page
Section Lock banner visible on Beneficiaries page
Section Lock banner visible on DTS (Designated Trustee Services) page
Lock setup modal opens when clicking 'Lock Section' button
Lock setup modal shows 4-step process: Section Password → Voice Passphrase → Backup Recovery → Confirm & Lock
Sidebar shows correct navigation for benefactor role (MY LEGACY section with all nav items)
Sidebar shows correct navigation for beneficiary role (LEGACY ACCESS, ESTATES, ACCOUNT sections)
Sidebar shows correct navigation for admin role (ADMINISTRATION, ACCOUNT sections)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Mitchell Family Estate data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Beneficiary portal fully tested: Estate Hub, Pre-transition page, Settings with subscription pricing. Admin dashboard tested: user database with search/filter, stats display, tabs. Section Lock system tested on all 5 lockable pages (Vault, Checklist, Messages, Beneficiaries, DTS). Lock setup modal verified with 4-step process. All login flows working with OTP. Voice verification and DTS backend processing are MOCKED.

mocked_apis.voice_verification: Voice recording in lock/unlock modal is mocked (simulates 3s recording)
